Sanjayanagar in Bangalore is a well-established residential locality known for its connectivity, lifestyle and robust infrastructure. Its proximity to major roads like New Bell Road and Outer Ring Road ensures seamless connectivity to key areas such as Hebal, Malleshwaram and Yashwantpur. The area is well-served by BMTC buses, with frequent services and decent metro connectivity nearby. Sanjay Nagar offers a balanced lifestyle with access to gems, shopping malls like Orion Mall and local markets for daily needs.

Additionally, the growing commercialization has increased noise levels, which might be bothersome for residents.

Sanjay Nagar is one of the most sought-after localities in Bangalore. It is located on the left side of National Highway 7 and close to the Indian Space Research Organisation Headquarters. Sanjay Nagar is a fast-developing locality known for its scenic beauty, greenery, and several parks. The locality has several residential projects, and many well-renowned builders want to construct their projects in the locality. Some of the prominent projects in the locality include Deccan Structure Vista, Eeva 54, and Libero Apartments. The locality is well-planned, and the infrastructure is phenomenal. Several roads, like MG Road, OuterRing Road, and Peripheral Ring Road, connect Sanjay Nagar to the nearby localities. Railway Station is also present near the locality. The Green Line of the Bangaluru Metro runs efficiently in the locality. The locality has all the basic facilities ready at hand. There are high-class educational institutes in the locality. The healthcare facility is phenomenal as well. Banking and ATM services are quite easy. The place also has several marketplaces, shopping complexes, and malls. Sanjay Nagar houses several employment hubs as well. Many companies like Philips, MRI Tech, IBM, and Nokia offer employment to the residents. All in all, Sanjay Nagar is a good residential locality.

Indira Nagar is a popular residential and commercial locality located in the eastern part of Bangalore, Karnataka, India. It is named after the former Indian Prime Minister, Indira Gandhi, and is one of the most sought-after areas of the city. Indira Nagar is well-connected to other parts of Bangalore through various modes of transportation, including buses, taxis, and metro. The nearest metro station is the Indira Nagar metro station, which is part of the Bangalore Metro's Purple Line. The area is known for its commercial establishments, with several offices, restaurants, cafes, and bars located here. The 100 Feet Road and the 12th Main Road are the major commercial hubs of Indira Nagar, and are always buzzing with activity. Apart from commercial establishments, Indira Nagar is also home to several parks and gardens, including the Indira Nagar Park, the BDA Complex Park, and the Namma Metro Park. These green spaces offer a refreshing break from the hustle and bustle of city life. Indira Nagar also has several shopping and entertainment options, with several malls and markets located in the vicinity. Some of the popular shopping destinations in the area include the 1 MG Lido Mall, the Garuda Mall, and the CMH Road Market. Overall, Indira Nagar is a well-developed and popular locality in Bangalore, offering a comfortable and convenient lifestyle to its residents. The most prominent areas near Indira Nagar are CV Raman Nagar, Koramangala, Domlur, HAL, Murgeshpalya are just a few mins away.

Locality Guide
for Thanisandra, Bangalore

The coordinates of Thanisandra are 13.0559° N, 77.6325° E. It is a locality in the Bangalore East Taluk within the Indian State of Karnataka and is a part of the Bangalore Urban District as well. The area is witnessing widespread development with the main road being widened and also as an alternative option towards accessing the International Airport in Bangalore. The area is a part of the Bangalore Mahanagara Palike and has become a top pick for professionals and families who wish to stay near the airport. It is also witnessing the rapid development of all necessary civic and Infrastructure and Details courtesy of the BBMP. Infrastructure and Details The St. George Public School lies 400 metres away from the locality while the Thanisandra Main Road is a connectivity lifeline for the residents of the area as well. The Shree Manyata Hospital is located 1 km away from the area as well. There are all necessary amenities at the fingertips of residents in this locality. Property in Thanisandra You will find several property options available in Thanisandra, which has witnessed swift residential growth and development over the years. There are options for 2, 2.5 and 3 BHK apartments here in the locality. You can also choose from several spacious 4 BHK apartment units in the area.

G:Corp Developers Pvt. Ltd. was originated from the property division of The Great Eastern Shipping Company Ltd. with Ghanshyam Sheth as its Executive Chairman. This became Gesco Corporation Ltd., a public entity which later became Mahindra Gesco Ltd. Later Gesco Corporation (South) Ltd. was formed; subsequently this was incorporated as G: Corp Pvt. Ltd. which is the current holding company of the group. Today, G:Corp Developers Pvt. Ltd. is a flagship company of the G:Corp Group - a Company that offers Integrity and Transparency at the highest level ensuring value addition to all our stakeholders. The initiatives of the company revolve only around the customer, which translates into the best contemporary design, innovation, space optimization and quality implementation. They create Spaces that are Aesthetic and Tasteful, Efficient in Space Planning and Environment Friendly. G:Corp Developers has the distinction of creating and developing quality spaces in the cities of Bengaluru, Pune and Mumbai both in the Residential and Commercial segments. They have handed over approximately 6 million square feet of Residential, Commercial and Retail space in the recent past. Further, they are currently developing about 4 million square feet and have signed another 11 million square feet for future development.

About The Icon
The Icon is a residential project in Thanisandra, Bangalore. It is set in an area of 19.27 Acres . The Icon offers Apartment. Available configurations include 3 BHK, 4 BHK. Apartment, as per the area plan, are in the size range of 1513.0 - 2021.0 sq.ft.. The property is Ready to Move. There are 12 buildings for sale. The project was launched in January 2015 and possession date of The Icon is Dec, 2016. The Icon is located in Nagawara Junction, Thanisandra Main Road. The project is developed by G: Corp Developers. There are 1131 units for sale.
The Icon is equipped with various resident-centric amenities that includes Power Backup. Tennis Court, Squash Court, Badminton Court, Cycling & Jogging Track - these are some avenues for sports lovers. Residents can make use of Spa/Sauna/Steam, provisions in the project. Enjoy a class-apart lifestyle at The Icon.
This project meets all mandates as required by the state authority. RERA ID of The Icon is Tower F RERA Permanent Number : PRM/KA/RERA/1251/446/PR/171016/000420, Tower CDE , RERA Permanent Number : PRM/KA/RERA/1251/446/PR/171015/000326.
Located close to prominent suburbs of Bangalore, the area of Thanisandra has prominent schools and hospitals within a close distance.

Rajarajeshwari Nagar (R.R. Nagar) is a locality in South Bangalore, Karnataka, India. It is located in the southern part of Bangalore on the Mysore road. The locality has been named after a famous temple - Rajarajeshwari Temple which was built in early 1960s by Sri Tiruchi Swami. The area has lots of greenery and is one of the nice residential localities in Bangalore. Ideal homes, BEML layout, BHEL Layout etc. are the zones within Rajarajeshwari Nagar (RR Nagar in short). From Mysore road, there is a Grand Arch constructed at the entrance of this area. The arch was built by the Rajarajeshwari Temple and inaugurated by then Prime Minister P. V. Narasimha Rao.

Armane Nagar is a beautiful hub which is an promising and upcoming residential area in the Silicon Valley of India, Bengaluru. This serene locale is easily commutable via roads and railway. It lies adjacent to Asian Highway 47 which further connects it to Gwalior, Bengaluru, Thane, Mumbai Nashik and Belgaum. Malleswaram Railway Station is situated at a stone's throw distance. A number of bus services are available from here. It lies next to Sankey Tank. The celebrated Training Command Golf Course and Central Power Research Institute are present over here. A number of educational institutions are located in the neck of the woods like Kendriya Vidyalaya, MS Ramaiah Institute of Management, Indiand Veternary Research Institute, FRV Group of Institutions, etc. Kempegowda Tower Park is situated here. This place is grabbing attention of hordes of Real Estate investors as it is blessed with serene ambiance worth living. Several number of basic establishments are available here for recreational purpose like malls, parks, gourmets, hospitals, banks,

Locality Guide
for Jakkur, Bangalore
Share
+
58 More
In Bangalore, Karnataka, India, a suburb called Jakkur (sometimes written Jakkuru) is located. The sole designated general aviation field in the city is the 200-acre Jakkur Aerodrome, which was founded in 1948. One of the nation's first flying academies, the Government Flying Training School (GFTS), is situated in Jakkur.
Read More
Metro is being built in the bangalore city and right now the city has yellow line metro.
Yelahanka's RMZ Galleria Mall is 6.3 kilometres distant and can be reached in 15 minutes. One of the main research institutions, such as the Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research, is located in Jakkur (JNCASR). Jakkur can be reached in 12 minutes by the renowned Elements Mall.
more
What is good here
The primary thoroughfares that link Jakkur with other well-known locations are Talacauvery Road, Amruthahalli Main Road, and Jakkur Main Road. 20 to 25 minutes pass quickly From Jakkur, you may drive to Kodigehalli Railway Station (6.9 km) and Hebbal Railway Station (6.7 km). Daily commuters may easily visit various areas of the city because BMTC buses run continuously throughout the day. The distance to the Kempegowda International Airport is 25.7 kilometres, and it takes 40 minutes to get there. Use National Highway 44 to get there. Byappanahalli Metro Station (15.4km) and Swami Vivekananda Metro Station provide convenient access from Jakkur to various areas of Bangalore (14km).read more
Street lights are available.
Air quality is nice.
What can be better
Public transport can be improved.
Air quality can be worked on due the highest congestion.
Rental rates can not be managed in posh areas and goes up every year(Rs. 35.000).

Parappana Agrahara is a neighborhood in Bangalore, India. It is situated on the outskirts of the city, near the Bangalore Rural district. It is an important commercial and industrial area, with several large companies located in the vicinity. It is also home to the Parappana Agrahara Central Prison, one of the largest prisons in India. The area is also known for its educational institutions, such as Bangalore University, JSS College and Bharathiya Vidya Bhavan. The area is well connected with other parts of the city through a network of roads, buses and trains. The locality doesn’t face any water logging issues as the drainage system here are well maintained. It also has many shops, restaurants, cafes and other amenities. The area is also known for its vibrant nightlife, with several pubs and bars in the vicinity. Parappana Agrahara is a great place to visit and experience the culture and diversity of Bangalore. Male Population: 34,317 Female Population: 29,918 Nearest airport & distance (Aerial): Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru - 36.5 km Nearest Railway Station & Distance (Aerial): Bengaluru City Junction Railway Station - 20.5 km

Locality Guide
for Kalyan Nagar, Bangalore

124 More
Kalyan Nagar is one of the fastest-growing localities of Bangalore. It is surrounded by Hennur Bagalor road, HRBR Layout, Kammanahalli and Banaswadi. The area is situated at a 3km distance from Hennur Road and has proximity to NH 44, which passes through the centre of the neighbourhood, AH 45 and NH 75. Kalyan Nagar has a significant location advantage due to its robust connectivity with road infrastructure through the Outer Ring Road, 80 feet broad and 100 feet road. Banaswadi railway station and Baiyappanahalli Metro Station provide excellent ease in accessibility and connectivity. Proximity to the Kempegowda International Airport has raised the property prices in Kalyan Nagar. The State Government has proposed another closer route to reach the airport, and it is expected to double the property prices in the coming years. This location has witnessed a tremendous rise in infrastructural projects by some notable builders, including NCN Developers, SLV Projects, Gina Developers and Sri Saila Constructions. Nearby IT parks include Manyata Embassy Business Park, Bagmane Tech Park and Infantry Techno Park. Is Kalyan Nagar a good area in Bangalore? Kalyan Nagar has good infrastructure, shopping malls, schools, and hospitals, making it a great place to live. In addition, its close proximity to the Airport and the Ring Road make it an attractive choice for those looking for a comfortable suburban lifestyle.

Locality Guide
for Varthur, Bangalore
Share
Locality Overview Video
+
36 More
Varthur is one of the most fast developing areas of Bangalore. It shares its border with Whitefield which is the largest technology clusters in South Asia. It follows a lifestyle of ‚ walk to work‚ with EPIP (Export Promotion Industrial Park) & ITP-B (International Tech Park - Bangalore) in the vicinity. The EPIP is one of the country's first Information Technology Parks and ITP-B houses offices of many IT and ITES companies. The location also enjoys excellent connectivity to the major MNC‚ s like Hindustan Unilever, Britannia, HP, Capgemini, Tata Elxsi, ITPL, Brigade Tech Park, Bhoruka Tech Park and many more. Apart from Balagare Road, there are two other major four-lane roads that connect Varthur to Bangalore city. These roads are Whitefield Road via Mahadevapura and Varthur Road via Marathahalli. Both roads intersect with Karnataka State Highway 35 (SH 35) which runs in the North-South direction (Siddlaghatta in the north to Anekal in the south). The much anticipated Namma Metro Rail Project by the Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation Limited (BMRCL) will soon connect this locality to other regions in the city. Various shopping malls like The Forum Value, Phoenix Market City, Park Square Mall and Inorbit Mall exist in the vicinity of this area. The area houses the Varthur Lake which is one of the most beautiful lakes in Bangalore offering picturesque views people residing in and around this region.

58 More
In Bangalore, Karnataka, India, a suburb called Jakkur (sometimes written Jakkuru) is located. The sole designated general aviation field in the city is the 200-acre Jakkur Aerodrome, which was founded in 1948. One of the nation's first flying academies, the Government Flying Training School (GFTS), is situated in Jakkur.
Read More
Metro is being built in the bangalore city and right now the city has yellow line metro.
Yelahanka's RMZ Galleria Mall is 6.3 kilometres distant and can be reached in 15 minutes. One of the main research institutions, such as the Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research, is located in Jakkur (JNCASR). Jakkur can be reached in 12 minutes by the renowned Elements Mall.
more
What is good here
The primary thoroughfares that link Jakkur with other well-known locations are Talacauvery Road, Amruthahalli Main Road, and Jakkur Main Road. 20 to 25 minutes pass quickly From Jakkur, you may drive to Kodigehalli Railway Station (6.9 km) and Hebbal Railway Station (6.7 km). Daily commuters may easily visit various areas of the city because BMTC buses run continuously throughout the day. The distance to the Kempegowda International Airport is 25.7 kilometres, and it takes 40 minutes to get there. Use National Highway 44 to get there. Byappanahalli Metro Station (15.4km) and Swami Vivekananda Metro Station provide convenient access from Jakkur to various areas of Bangalore (14km).read more
Street lights are available.
Air quality is nice.

Public transport can be improved.
Air quality can be worked on due the highest congestion.

Chikkalasandra is a prominent suburb located in the Southern part of Bangalore. The locality is primarily of residential type and offers several plots, residential flats, and independent houses. Major residential areas around this locality are HMS Layout, Ramanjaneyanagar, Aravalli, and Sneha colony. The locality is ideal for settlement and some of the projects in the locality include Chartered Madhura, Kshitij carnations, Rampriya Brundavan Gardenia, Image Residency, Sri Ushodaya, etc. The area has advanced physical infrastructure and Nayandahalli Railway Station is just 6 km away and can be reached via Outer Ring Road. The Jayaprakash Nagar Metro Station is just 4 km from Chikkalasandra. It takes about 1.5 hours to reach the famous Kempegowda International Airport via Bellary road from the locality. The famous malls in this locality are Gopalan Promenade Mall, Gopalan Arcade Mall, and Brand City Shopping center. Some of the famous schools in this locality are Deccan International School, Stalwart International School, Bangalore International Academy, B M valley International School, etc. The major hospitals in this area are Maharaja Agrasen Hospital and Samastha hospital. Also, the area is home to many employment hubs like Whitefield.

Locality Guide
for Whitefield, Bangalore

Locality Overview Video
+
60 More
Whitefield, a key IT hub comprising hundreds of IT companies, is one of the most popular localities of Bangalore. Whitefield is connected to the rest of the city mainly through the Whitefield Main Road, SH-35, Old Airport Road and Whitefield Railway Station. Whitefield boasts the presence of quality social and retail infrastructure in the form of educational institutions, hospitals and entertainment avenues. Prominent colleges situated in the near Whitefield include Gopalan College of Engineering and Management and MVJ College of Engineering. Columbia Asia Hospital, Narayana Multispeciality Hospital and Sri Sathya Sai Super Speciality Hospital are major health care centres in the locality. Inorbit Mall, The Forum Neighbourhood Mall and Ascendas Park Square Mall are the prominent malls located within the locality. Marathahalli, Chansandra, Kadugodi, Valepura are some of the key surrounding localities to Whitefield. Bangalore airport is 39 km away and it takes an hour. Prominent residential projects situated nearby are Prestige Shantiniketan, Prestige Lakeside Habitat, Brigade Cosmopolis, and the DivyaSree Republic of Whitefield.  Why is Whitefield famous? Whitefield is famous for being the home of India's largest technology park and one of the country's biggest IT hubs. With a number of world-renowned technology companies located here, it is a major centre of digital transformation and the outsourcing of technology services. It is also the home of some of India's top IT professionals and is known for its vibrant lifestyle and night life.

51 More
Yelahanka, located on the northern outskirts of Bengaluru near the airport and around 14 kilometres from downtown, has developed as a significant real estate destination due to its strong physical and social facilities. The government is actively pushing North Bengaluru as a location for business activities. The social infrastructure in Yelahanka is adequate, and numerous Tier I and Tier II builders have purchased land lots and begun construction in this area. The area is well-known for the presence of many defence facilities, including the Air Force Station, the Border Security Force (BSF) Campus, and the Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF) Base. There is a nice mix of multi-storey apartment and villa developments in the market. Several residential developments in varying phases of development may be found in Yelahanka and its neighbouring areas. Purva Venezia, Unitech Heritage Estate, Godrej Avenues, and NCC Urban Nagarjuna Aster Park are a few examples of such developments. Manyata Tech Park and the IT corridor along the Outer Ring Road (ORR) share strong connections. Sound connectivity is provided via Bellary Road, Doddaballapur Road, Yelahanka Road, and Yelahanka Junction.

Gnana Bharathi is a fast developing area in Bangalore. Being located along the Mysore Road (SH-17) allows the residents to enjoy easy daily commute to the neighboring regions. This place is well served by the Gnanabharathi Halt Railway and Nayandahalli Railway Stations. Kempegowda International Airport also lies a brief driving distance away. The presence of a number of educational institutes has transformed this place into an educational hub. Some of these include Bangalore University, VSS International Public School, Vidyaniketan Public School etc. The presence of a number of schools, colleges, hospitals, health care centers, ATMs, banks, eatery joints and shopping centers has resulted in attracting a number of investors, inhabitants and Real Estate Developers to Gnana Bharathi.

Locality Guide
for Kogilu, Bangalore
Share
Situated in the northern part of Bangalore, Kogilu locale is one of the upcoming locations. Due to its proximity to several upscale locations like Yelahanka, Jakkur, Kannur, Sahakar Nagar and Thanisandra, the locality is becoming one of the preferred hubs in terms of making investment or buying a living. There are ample shopping destinations within 3 km radius such as Kurlappa Shopping Complex, The Galleria Mall and MVM Plaza that are reachable within around 25 minutes drive from the locale. Kogilu area enjoys close proximity to several schools like Mallya Aditi International School, Canadian International School, Wisdom Montfort International School and Trio World Academy. Also, Shushrusha Hospital, Ashwini Hospital, KK Hospital and Navachethana Hospital lies within the vicinity of Kogilu locality for medical assistance. Few high-end companies are also nestled in Manyata Tech Park like Microsoft, IBM, Cognizant, Concentrix etc. Around 33.5Km, Whitefield IT hub is located properly accessible through National Highway-44. The area is known for a nice environment with civic amenities available including technology parks, corporate offices, super specialty hospitals, restaurants, malls and shopping complexes. Kannada is the local language here.

Samskruti Enclave is an ideal place to call home, offering a perfect balance of comfort, convenience, and quality living. Surrounded by lush greenery and fresh air, the community enjoys minimal pollution, making it a healthy and peaceful environment. The wide, well-planned roads ensure smooth access, while the neighborhood remains calm and welcoming. With underground cabling, efficient street lighting, and zero waterlogging, the infrastructure is thoughtfully designed for hassle-free living. Its strategic location near major IT hubs, shopping malls, reputed schools, and top hospitals makes it highly convenient for professionals and families, ensuring both modern lifestyle and everyday ease.

The wide roads and open spaces reduce the crowded feel, which might not appeal to those who prefer a busier neighborhood. Being a relatively green and clean environment, it lacks the chaos of typical urban areas, which some may miss. Also, with IT hubs, schools, and malls nearby, everything is within easy reach, so there’s hardly any excuse to step far out—which can feel limiting for frequent traveler’s.

Electronic City is the most significant information technology hub in Bangalore, India. It is popularly known as Ecity by the people of Bangalore. It is spread over 800 acres in Konappana Agrahara Doddathogur Villages. Electronic city consists of 4 zones known as phases. Electronic City has around 200 IT companies, and its campus is located there. Some well-known companies are Infosys, Wipro, HCL, TCS, Biocon, and Tech Mahindra. It is a great residential destination. It is like a home to IT companies. It has a sound social infrastructure and robust connectivity. People don't have to wait for too long to get transport as there is easy access to vehicles like buses, trains, and cabs. Electronic City is known for its environment and greenery. There are many parks nearby where people can take a walk or sit and spend their time peacefully. It also has reputed hospitals, schools, shops, and restaurants that provide good quality food and excellent service. Is Electronic City expensive? Yes, Electronic City is an expensive area of Bangalore, India. Housing prices and rental prices can be very high compared to other areas in the city. Is electronic city good place to live? Yes, Electronic City is a good place to live. It is one of the most prosperous sites in Bangalore due to its proximity to major IT firms, educational institutions, and entertainment hubs. Electronic City provides excellent connectivity to the city and has many residential options from affordable to lavish.

for Chikkalasandra, Bangalore

Chikkalasandra is a prominent suburb located in the Southern part of Bangalore. The locality is primarily of residential type and offers several plots, residential flats, and independent houses. Major residential areas around this locality are HMS Layout, Ramanjaneyanagar, Aravalli, and Sneha colony. The locality is ideal for settlement and some of the projects in the locality include Chartered Madhura, Kshitij carnations, Rampriya Brundavan Gardenia, Image Residency, Sri Ushodaya, etc. The area has advanced physical infrastructure and Nayandahalli Railway Station is just 6 km away and can be reached via Outer Ring Road. The Jayaprakash Nagar Metro Station is just 4 km from Chikkalasandra. It takes about 1.5 hours to reach the famous Kempegowda International Airport via Bellary road from the locality. The famous malls in this locality are Gopalan Promenade Mall, Gopalan Arcade Mall, and Brand City Shopping center. Some of the famous schools in this locality are Deccan International School, Stalwart International School, Bangalore International Academy, B M valley International School, etc. The major hospitals in this area are Maharaja Agrasen Hospital and Samastha hospital. Also, the area is home to many employment hubs like Whitefield.

Locality Guide
for Basavanagudi, Bangalore
Share
Locality Overview Video
+
42 More
Renowned as an excellent commercial and residential locality in Bangalore, Basavanagudi has developed as a popular real estate due to its proximity to schools, colleges, hospitals, temples, markets, banks, and malls. Situated along the borders of Jayanagar, Basavanagudi is located in the heart of the city. It is also considered as one of the best heritage locations in Bangalore as the name Basavanagudi comes from the Bull Temple which has the monolith statue of the Nandi Bull. It is one of the few localities in Bangalore that has retained the old world charm but that does not mean it lacks modern amenities and other facilities. Basavanagudi is the home to some notable authors, politicians and cricketers, therefore making it a posh locality to Basavanagudi consists of more than 40 different housing projects, therefore caters to the needs of various individuals. Despite holding onto the vintage vibe, several developmental projects are soon to be started in the locality which even includes the construction of a skywalk and widening of the NH-209 road to make living more comfortable. All these features, therefore, make Basavanagudi an attractive place to live in.

Locality Guide
for Chikkalasandra, Bangalore
Share

17 More
Chikkalasandra is a prominent suburb located in the Southern part of Bangalore. The locality is primarily of residential type and offers several plots, residential flats, and independent houses. Major residential areas around this locality are HMS Layout, Ramanjaneyanagar, Aravalli, and Sneha colony. The locality is ideal for settlement and some of the projects in the locality include Chartered Madhura, Kshitij carnations, Rampriya Brundavan Gardenia, Image Residency, Sri Ushodaya, etc. The area has advanced physical infrastructure and Nayandahalli Railway Station is just 6 km away and can be reached via Outer Ring Road. The Jayaprakash Nagar Metro Station is just 4 km from Chikkalasandra. It takes about 1.5 hours to reach the famous Kempegowda International Airport via Bellary road from the locality. The famous malls in this locality are Gopalan Promenade Mall, Gopalan Arcade Mall, and Brand City Shopping center. Some of the famous schools in this locality are Deccan International School, Stalwart International School, Bangalore International Academy, B M valley International School, etc. The major hospitals in this area are Maharaja Agrasen Hospital and Samastha hospital. Also, the area is home to many employment hubs like Whitefield.

Ramamurthy Nagar is a rapidly growing suburb in Bengaluru, Karnataka.The cost of living in the locality is quite low and affordable.The residential properties in Ramamurthy Nagar are quite cheaper and affordable than the nearby localities of Krishnarajapuram, Banaswadi and CV Raman Nagar. The connectivity in this region is considered to be excellent due to Outer Ring Road and Old Madras Road. Ramamurthy Nagar faces no water shortage as the water connection is through the Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board's Cauvery water connection. Baiyappanahalli Metro Station is located at the Purple Line of Namma Metro which is only 4km away. Commercial hubs like Manyata Tech Park and International Tech Park are located within a 10km radius only. Various prominent schools and colleges are located at a walking distance from the locality. Notable and well equipped hospitals, posh restaurants, excellent social infrastructure has raised the demands of the locality. Raghavendra Extension, Muneshwara Nagar, Kalpatharu Layout, Sir M V Nagar, Priyadarshini Layout are the nearby localities to Ramamurthy Nagar. The completion of the Peripheral Ring Road would ease accessibility for the localites. It would provide a faster route to reach the Airport and various other job avenues.
Read More
A straight route to the Kempagowda International Airport connecting the outer ring road is being built
The completion of Peripheral Ring Road is underway
Various industrial and commercial projects are underway owing to proximity to commercial hubs
Various industrial and commercial projects are underway owing to proximity to commercial hubs
More traffic lights are being installed at major intersections to help the traffic flow
What is good here
Ramamurthy Nagar has good public routes to all major localities via metro, government buses and railways as wellread more
Ramamurthy Nagar has many good schools in its vicinity
Ramamurthy Nagar has an active night life with many clubs and pubs open till late nightread more
What can be better
Buses takes too long to reach the destination due to high congestions on the streetsread more
No vet clinics are there in Ramamurthy Nagar which is a sad news for pet owners
There have been a few chain snatching cases in Ramamurthy Nagar

Good things here
Akshaya Nagar was planned Beautifully!!... one side is all the commercial area, other side is completely residential.... so basically Residential area is very peaceful and not much vehicle noise.... also, this area has 3-4 hills... 3 lakes... parks, wide roads... so an amazing spot for a peaceful life. next with the shops... Dmart ✅ Star Market ✅ Reliance Mart ✅ (other marts: Ample Mart and Safari Mart)... Meenakshi Mall is at 3-4 kms..... Hospitals : 3-4 Good hospitals in Akshaya Nagar and then within 10 kms u have Apollo and Fortis... Schools: BGS within 5 kms and any school u say(PSBS,PSBB etc), the bus comes here... hangouts: McD ✅ KFC✅ Dominos✅ Biggies ✅... Hotels: Krishna Kuteera ✅ Kakaal Kairuchi ✅ Shanghai Court ✅ Mud-Cups✅ (plus another 7-10).... Anything u need its here!! 🙌

traffic in the commercial area is horrible especially in the evening time.... it takes more than 10 mins to just travel 1-2 kms.... also Akshaya Nagar is mostly filled with non residents in the evening time.. so parking is a huge problem in this area. u have to search almost for 10 mins to get a parking. traffic police is der, but yea... highly useless... they have never been able to Manage the traffic here.

Akshaya Nagar is an upcoming locality in Bangalore, Karnataka. It is located in North-East part of Bangalore and comes under E3 sub division of BBMP. It is a rapidly growing suburb, adjacent to other areas such as Banaswadi, CV Raman Nagar and Krishnarajapuram. Akshaya Nagar is near the outer ring road and close to three important rail stations. Akshaya Nagar has two important main roads, 'T.C Palya main road' and 'RM Nagar main road' which are its lifeline and is well connected with the entire city in terms of transportation.

Located in the Northern part of Bangalore, MedaHalli is one of the developing locations. Due to easy connectivity to the reputed tech hubs such as Bagmane Tech Park (35 minutes?) and RMZ Infinity Tech Park (26 minutes?), MedaHalli is witnessing more growth in the residential sector. The nearest prominent residential locality is KR Puram, which is 2.8km from MedaHalli easily reachable within 10 minutes via Old Madras Road. Mathrusree Silver Arcade, Aban Desire, Akshaya Lakeview, and Sreepada Apartment are the few residential projects in MedaHalli. Krishnarajapuram Railway Station is located at 8.9km and can be reached via National Highway-75 within 23 minutes. drive from Medahalli. Also, the Whitefield Railway Station (7.5km) is accessible within 21 minutes? through Belathur Main Road. Doddabanahalli Bus Station is located at 7km, which can be easily reachable within 18 minutes. via Old Madras Road. BMTC and KSRTC buses are also available frequently, ensuring connectivity to neighboring locations. One can reach Ujjval Metro Station (8.8km) via Whitefield-Hoskote Road within 24 minutes. drive. Kempegowda. International Airport (31.4km) can be reached in 50 minutes. drive via State Highway-104 from MedaHalli.

Locality Guide
for K Channasandra, Bangalore
Share
At the eastern edge of Bangalore city, near the Kadugodi neighborhood, is the village of Channasandra. It belongs to K.R. Puram (Vidhan Sabha constituency). A different name for it is K. Chandasandra. An emerging neighborhood in Bangalore, Channasandra is expanding quickly. Roadways and other forms of connection provide good access to the location. The Channasandra Main Road, which connects to various areas, is a crucial road. The Kalkere Main Road and the Kanakanagara Main Road also cross this community's border. The closest stations are Krpura Railway Station and Krishnarajapuram. Driving distance from the airport is Kempegowda International Airport. Jublee Degree College, Christian College of Nursing, SSR College of Science and Management, and a few other reputable educational institutions are in the area. There are a few good shopping options for locals, including Phoenix Market City, Soul Space Arena Mall, and Garuda Mall. Abaya Anjenaya Swamy Temple, Blessed John Paul II Church, and other revered religious buildings can also be seen in the area. In K Channasandra, there are plans for both commercial and residential development.

Locality Guide
for Kalkere, Bangalore

30 More
Kalkere is a residential locality in northeastern Bangalore. Kalkere offers villas, integrated townships, apartments, and residential plots. The nearby localities are Banjara Layout, Green Garden Phase 2, Rajkumar Layout, Jayanti Nagar, Ashirvad Colony, Kowdenahalli, Akshaya Nagar, NRI Layout, and Horamavu. Bangalore, Vijayapura, Malur, and Chikkaballapur are the nearby cities. The jurisdiction of K.R. Pura Assembly Constituency and Bangalore North Parliamentary Constituency covers the area. The latitude and longitude of Kalkere are 13.0335°N and 77.6739°E, respectively. With an area of 1.15 sq km, Kalkere has a population of 2234, including 1218 males and 1016 females, with a population density of 1941 people per sq km (according to the records of 2020). Kannada, Konkani, Tulu, Telugu, English, Kodava, and Hindi are the primary local languages here. The nearest major post office is Ramamurthy Nagar Post Office, whose pin code is 560016. The climate of Kalkere is a tropical savanna climate. The average annual temperature is 30°C degrees, and there is about 596 mm of rainfall in a year. April and December are the warmest and the coldest month, respectively. September gets the maximum rainfall, and January gets the minimum.

Locality Guide
for Nandini Layout, Bangalore
Share
+
21 More
A significant residential neighborhood located west of Bangalore is called Nandini Layout. The neighborhood is surrounded by Peenya, Kurubarahalli, Mahalakshmi Layout, and Yeshwantpur. The independent homes that exhibit horizontal development predominate in the neighborhood. the closeness to the city's business districts, including Malleshwaram, MG Road, and Commercial Street. For the Parks, Kanteerava Studio, and Dr. Rajkumar Samadhi, Nandini Layout is highly known. Nandini Layout is only 8 kilometers from the City train station and Kempegowda railway station. The Mahalakshmi metro station (green line) is just 2 kilometers away from this area. Bellary Road connects the area to the 36 km away Kempegowda International Airport. Numerous educational facilities can be found nearby, including Nandini Public School, Jnanavahini Public School, Indian National High School, SG International Public School, etc. The area is well-served by the Dr. Gangaraju Spine Treatment Center, Sri Vijayalakshmi Hospital, Sai Dental Clinic, Laali Hospital, and Spandana Hospital Rehabilitation Center in terms of medical infrastructure. The closest shopping centers to the area are Vaishnavi Saphire Mall (5 km) and Orion Mall (4 km). The World Trade Center (4 km), Rajaji Nagar IT Park (6 km), and Manyatha Embassy Tech Park are close by the area (14 km). Rajaji Nagar's industrial district is around 6 km away and can be reached in 30 minutes. While Peenya's industrial district is just 4 km away from the neighborhood.

Locality Guide
for Kammanahalli, Bangalore

30 More
Kammanahalli is a locality situated in the northeastern region of Bangalore city. It is bounded by HBR Layout, Lingarajapuram and Banaswadi. This locality was earlier categorised as a Village. However, due to rapid industrialisation and boost in the real estate sector, Kammanahalli is now known as a "Cosmopolitan Hub". It is popularly known as "Kammanhattan". There has been an increase in commercial activities with increasing numbers of retails and commercial establishments, eateries, educational institutes, health care centres and many industries. This location has now become a prime hub for residential complexes and industrial space. Kammanahalli is located about 12km from Yadiyur, famous for Lord Siddalingeshwar Temple and roughly 100km from the main Bangalore city. This city is also well known for its excellent connectivity with all social as well as commercial facilities. It is very close to Manyath Tech park and very close to Airport. Brigade Road and MG road meet Kammanahalli Road, which makes it easier to commute. The outer Ring road is about 1.8km away, connecting Kammanahlli to Hebbal, Tumkur road and merges with Nh 4. Metro station and Railway station are also located nearby.

Koramangala is an upscale residential and commercial area in Bangalore, India, known for its bustling retail and restaurant scene. It is one of Bangalore's trendiest locales, attracting a diverse range of social groups including the city's upper-middle class and IT professionals.It is home to numerous tech startups, IT companies, restaurants, pubs, shopping centers, and residential apartments. Besides, major IT parks of the city in Bellandur, Electronic City, and Whitefield are within 15 km of the locality.Its growing number of pubs, bars, cafes, and eateries make it a popular hangout spot, while its many shopping malls, independent shops, designer boutiques, and night markets draw in shoppers from all over the city. As a result, Koramangala has become a sought-after residential destination and a symbol of Bangalore's modern urban culture.The average property price in Koramangala ranges from INR 9,000 to 20,000 per square foot, depending on the location, amenities, and type of property. Residential apartments, independent houses, and commercial spaces are available in Koramangala, catering to different budgets and lifestyle requirements.

for Kaggadasapura, Bangalore

Kaggadasapura is also familiar as Upper Indiranagar. This area is a relatively new locality situated near DRDO township in CV Raman Nagar, Bangalore. Kaggadasapura region has many apartment complexes and is around 4 km at a distance from Indiranagar and old (HAL) Airport Road in Bangalore. Defence Avionics Research Establishment (DARE), Center for Artificial Intelligence Research (CAIR) and DRDO Phase II also lies within the boundaries of the locality. The neighbourhood has several prominent schools including National Centre for Excellence, Geethanjali Vidyalaya and Sishya BEML. Kaggadasapura Residents Welfare Association has also been formed recently. The area also has many temples like AyyappaSwamy Temple, Sri Jalakanteshwara Temple and many more for worshiping. The town provides good road and rail connectivity. Soul Space Arena Mall, Gopalan Signature Mall, Phoenix Marketcity are popular shopping malls close to Kaggadasapura. Medihope Hospital and Sri Laxmi Hospital are leading social amenities nearby. The Leela Palace and The Waverly Hotel are well-known hotels in the vicinity
Read More
The locale is seamlessly connected to IT hub of Whitefield almost 12 km via Outer Ring Road and HAL Old Airport Road
more
An upcoming railway-over-bridge near Kaggadasapura is planned to be constructed
Kaggadasapura also houses diverse multi complex shopping malls, theaters, banks, petrol pumps, restaurants and commercial area for spending joyful time available with better service facility |
more
Various developmental projects are underway as the retail development seems to be made on a large scale
more
The 48km Byappanahalli-Hosur doubling work and Heelalige-Rajanukunte suburban rail corridor are awaited to get completed that will smoothen movement of trains along Kaggadasapura crossing.
more
What is good here
Kaggadasapura is served by the Baiyappanhalli Railway Station, which is around 5.5 km awayread more
It is safe to go out at nights as the area is observed closely by authorities
Presence of proper green spaces, parks and jogging tracks in the vicinity helps the residents to get a quality timeread more
What can be better
Lacks direct metro connectivity, as Baiyyappanhalli Metro station is the nearest on Purple Line located at 5 km distanceread more
Not much of safety available during night time
In parks, there are no sufficient garbage or waste disposal management

Kattigenahalli, a residential neighborhood in the city's north, consists primarily of residential apartments, standalone homes, and residential plots. Residential developments in Kattigenahalli with thoughtful planning include SLV Lakeview, RAMS Lakeview Meadows, Hasini Meadows, Haarini Arcade, etc. The neighborhoods of Kattigenahalli include Yelahanka, Venkatala, Attukal Layout, Sathnur Village, and Hunasamaranahalli. Additionally, Kattigenahalli is becoming more popular among homebuyers because of its good access to tech parks like Embassy Manyata Business Park and Karle Special Economic Zone. The neighborhood is traversed by the Bagalur Main Road, and Kattigenahalli also benefits from great connectivity to other areas of the city via National Highway 44 and State Highway 104. The distance between the Kempegowda International Airport and the Yelahanka Junction is 4 kilometers on the Bagalur Main Road and 18 kilometers on National Highway 44, respectively. Within a 4 km radius of Kattigenahalli are renowned institutions including Bharathi Public School, Hilton High Innovative Learning, Ryan International School, and Euroschool North Campus. You may find medical facilities within 6 kilometers, including Om Shakti Hospital, Ashwini Hospital, KK Hospital, and NRV Hospital. The Galleria Mall (5 km), Esteem Mall (10 km), Elements Mall (14 km), and Mantri Square Mall (18 km) are close to Kattigenahalli and offer fantastic shopping experiences.

Locality Guide
for Jayanagar, Bangalore
Share
Locality Overview Video
+
75 More
Jayanagar is a popular, wealthy, commercial neighbourhood in the city of Bengaluru in Karnataka, India. It is one of the zones under the Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike (BBMP). The foundation of Jayanagar was laid in 1948. Known as one of the first planned neighbourhoods in Bengaluru, Jayanagar has 10 blocks of which the 3rd and 4th blocks are largely commercial hubs, while the rest are mostly residential. It is surrounded by similarly popular neighbourhoods like Basavanagudi, Wilson Garden, JP Nagar, Banashankari 2nd stage, Suddaguntepalya and BTM Layout among other areas. It is close to the Lalbagh Botanical Garden. Kalyani Magnum Infotech Park is a well-known, large office complex in Jayanagar as it is also a major hub for some big companies like Oracle, Accenture, ObjectWin, Honeywell, Trianz and many others. Top-quality schools like Bangalore International Academy and Carmel Convent High school can be found here. The locale has access to reputed hospitals like Sagar Hospital and Manipal Hospital. With luxurious apartments offering unrestricted access to all kinds of amenities and facilities, Jayanagar is one of the best localities of Bengaluru.

Ramamurthy Nagar is a rapidly growing suburb in Bengaluru, Karnataka.The cost of living in the locality is quite low and affordable.The residential properties in Ramamurthy Nagar are quite cheaper and affordable than the nearby localities of Krishnarajapuram, Banaswadi and CV Raman Nagar. The connectivity in this region is considered to be excellent due to Outer Ring Road and Old Madras Road. Ramamurthy Nagar faces no water shortage as the water connection is through the Bangalore Water Supply and Sewerage Board's Cauvery water connection. Baiyappanahalli Metro Station is located at the Purple Line of Namma Metro which is only 4km away. Commercial hubs like Manyata Tech Park and International Tech Park are located within a 10km radius only. Various prominent schools and colleges are located at a walking distance from the locality. Notable and well equipped hospitals, posh restaurants, excellent social infrastructure has raised the demands of the locality. Raghavendra Extension, Muneshwara Nagar, Kalpatharu Layout, Sir M V Nagar, Priyadarshini Layout are the nearby localities to Ramamurthy Nagar. The completion of the Peripheral Ring Road would ease accessibility for the localites. It would provide a faster route to reach the Airport and various other job avenues.

A straight route to the Kempagowda International Airport connecting the outer ring road is being built

JP Nagar is a prime locality in South Bangalore. Prime residential areas in proximity are Jayanagar, Banashankari, Bannerghatta Road, and BTM Layout. J P Nagar is spread across 2,500 acres of land, divided into 9 phases. Leading real estate builders in JP Nagar include Puravankara, Prestige, Brigade, and many others. The landmark projects in JP Nagar, like DS Max Stone Hill and Puravankara Coronation Square, have transformed it into an upmarket for residential and commercial. Many elite schools, colleges, business organizations, hospitals, restaurants, recreational clubs, and malls are in its proximity. It has beautiful lakes such as Sarakki lake and Puttenhalli lake. The physical infrastructure is excellent, with parks, wide roads. J P Nagar is well connected to the Bengaluru City Junction Railway Station; the nearest bus station is JP Nagar's 3rd Phase Bus Stop, off the busy Outer Ring Road. It is located 44 KM from the Kempegowda International Airport. BMTC bus service offers efficient connectivity to other parts of the city. The nearest metro stations from the JP Nagar area are Banashankari Metro Station and Rashtriya Vidyalaya Road Metro Station.

Locality Guide
for Kodigehalli, Bangalore
Share
+
2 More
Bangalore's suburb of Kodigehalli. There, ancient temples and contemporary buildings push against and overlap. Sahakarnagar is next to Kodigehalli on the north side. The Kodigehalli neighbourhood is connected to the main Kodigehalli road through the new airport road. A road to Thindlu is located west of the Kodigehalli railway station. The Dodda Ganapa Devasthana indicates the location of the Kodigehalli bus stop (a Ganapathi temple). Buses to the city centre run frequently. A modern residential development called Tatanagar, known as the I.I.Sc layout is located east of the historic Kodigehalli. This is because I.I.Sc present and former personnel created the layout. The headquarters of Aadhar is situated here. On the outer ring road, Bhadrappa Layout is located east of Tatanagar. There are Omkareswara and Ganga temples on the route from Kodigehalli to Tatanagar. Additionally, helping the location is the high-frequency BMTC transit infrastructure. Additionally, the area has Bengaluru was originally recorded in documents from the Ganga era as a small hamlet, and its position corresponds with the current Halebengaluru close to Kodigehalli.

30 More
NRI layout is a residential area located in Bengaluru, which is a part of the Yelahanka region. This area is located close to Kempegowda International Airport, as well as many educational institutions, hospitals, shopping complexes, and entertainment centers. It is also connected to various parts of the city through a network of good roads. NRI layout has a good mix of villas, apartments, duplexes, and independent houses. It is becoming a popular residential destination for home buyers due to its proximity to the airport, key business and IT hubs, and many other facilities. The layout is equipped with a wide array of modern amenities such as rainwater harvesting, sewage treatment plant, round the clock water supply, well-developed streets, and many parks. It provides a peaceful environment with wide roads and green cover. The layout also has many banks, ATMs, and shopping complexes. NRI layout has become a sought-after residential area among people who prefer to live close to the airport and city centre. It also provides a pleasant and secure atmosphere for its residents.

Locality Guide
for Whitefield, Bangalore

Locality Overview Video
+
60 More
Whitefield, a key IT hub comprising hundreds of IT companies, is one of the most popular localities of Bangalore. Whitefield is connected to the rest of the city mainly through the Whitefield Main Road, SH-35, Old Airport Road and Whitefield Railway Station. Whitefield boasts the presence of quality social and retail infrastructure in the form of educational institutions, hospitals and entertainment avenues. Prominent colleges situated in the near Whitefield include Gopalan College of Engineering and Management and MVJ College of Engineering. Columbia Asia Hospital, Narayana Multispeciality Hospital and Sri Sathya Sai Super Speciality Hospital are major health care centres in the locality. Inorbit Mall, The Forum Neighbourhood Mall and Ascendas Park Square Mall are the prominent malls located within the locality. Marathahalli, Chansandra, Kadugodi, Valepura are some of the key surrounding localities to Whitefield. Bangalore airport is 39 km away and it takes an hour. Prominent residential projects situated nearby are Prestige Shantiniketan, Prestige Lakeside Habitat, Brigade Cosmopolis, and the DivyaSree Republic of Whitefield.  Why is Whitefield famous? Whitefield is famous for being the home of India's largest technology park and one of the country's biggest IT hubs. With a number of world-renowned technology companies located here, it is a major centre of digital transformation and the outsourcing of technology services. It is also the home of some of India's top IT professionals and is known for its vibrant lifestyle and night life.

Muneshwara Nagar is a locality in Bengaluru which is steadily booming as an upcoming residential hub. The HAL Bangalore International Airport is located at a short drive distance and connects this place with other major cities of nationally and globally. The Hosur Road and Hosapalya Road connects with AH43, that links with other important cities. Carmelaram Railway Station is situated at a close proximity. Several Bus stops are situated within the bounds of the place that simplifies commuting of the residents, such as Kudlu Gate Junction, Garebhavipalya, Hosapalya and Somasundarapalya. Educational Institutes like Mt Litera Zee School, Saint Francis School, Vidya Jyothi School, Sri Chaitanya Techno School, Ravindra Bharathi Global School and Sadhguru Sainath International School. It is also dotted with two beautiful lakes namely Garvebhavipalya and Soma Sundara Palya. A number of delicious gourmets for bon-vivant are also present over here like Naveed's Pick and Move, Domino's, Best Bakery, F. M. Bakes, Naveen Chettinad Hotel, CCD, Nandi, etc. The place is also dotted with temples, banks, ATMs, hospitals, etc that grabs attention of various Real Estate investors from all over the world.
